name: subscription-tracker-ai-mcp
description: MCP server for subscription tracker ai. Features add subscription, get total spend, list subscriptions. From MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: add_subscription
tools.description: Add a subscription to track. Cost in USD/month. Billing cycle: monthly, yearly, quarterly.

tools.name: get_total_spend
tools.description: Calculate total subscription spend. Period: monthly, yearly, daily.

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List all tracked subscriptions. Sort by: cost, name, category, date.

tools.name: find_duplicates
tools.description: Find potentially duplicate or overlapping subscriptions in the same category.
